/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/virtual_midi_keyboard.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/virtual_midi_keyboard.dir/virtual_midi_keyboard_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/virtual_midi_keyboard.dir/src/virtual_midi_keyboard/virtual_midi_keyboard_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/virtual_midi_keyboard.dir/src/virtual_midi_keyboard/vk_mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/virtual_midi_keyboard.dir/src/virtual_midi_keyboard/vk_configdialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/virtual_midi_keyboard.dir/src/virtual_midi_keyboard/vk_helpdialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/virtual_midi_keyboard.dir/src/virtual_midi_keyboard/vk_knob.cpp.o CMakeFiles/virtual_midi_keyboard.dir/src/virtual_midi_keyboard/vk_midiio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/virtual_midi_keyboard.dir/src/virtual_midi_keyboard/vk_pianokeyboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/virtual_midi_keyboard.dir/src/virtual_midi_keyboard/vk_settings.cpp.o -o virtual_midi_keyboard  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfluidsynth.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librtmidi.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Multimedia.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.9.2
